pattern: Maximize the product of (a-1)*(b-1) by selecting the two largest elements — sorting or a single pass for the top two suffices.
hints: The function (nums[i]-1)*(nums[j]-1) is maximized when both factors are as large as possible.
Find the two largest distinct-index values in the array — you don't need to sort the whole array.
A single scan tracking the top-two values is O(n) and constant space.

edge_inputs.description: Largest is at the end — must not always pick first two

stress.description: Random array of length 500 with values 1-1000
